headline: How The Bowman Consulting Group (BWMN) Narrative Is Evolving With New Growth And Valuation Assumptions
summary: Bowman Consulting Group’s consolidated fair value estimate has moved from about US$44.50 to roughly US$48.33 per share, a change of around 8.6%. Analysts linking this shift to their updated models point to stronger revenue assumptions, higher adjusted EBITDA estimates in later years, and recent demand trends that they view as supportive of the new target range. As you read on, you will see how these updated assumptions fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch if you are...
